_comment: Pikachu deal-hunting buckets for the Pokemon collector page (docs/pikachu.html). Each bucket is one eBay Browse search. Edit freely — re-run pokemon_deals_agent.py to refresh.

buckets.label: Vintage Holo Pikachu
buckets.blurb: Base Set, Jungle, and early Wizards-era holos. Where the journey starts.

buckets.label: Surfing & Flying Pikachu
buckets.blurb: 1999 promo classics. Surfing Pikachu (28/64 Jungle) is a Hall-of-Fame card.

buckets.label: Pokemon GO Pikachu #025
buckets.blurb: The hat-Pikachus from the 2022 Pokemon GO crossover set.

buckets.label: Pikachu V / VMAX
buckets.blurb: Big-energy modern hits — Rainbow Rare VMAX is the trophy.

buckets.label: Pikachu ex / Full Art
buckets.blurb: Newer 'ex' era — Special Illustration Rare is the chase art.

buckets.label: Pikachu Promo Cards
buckets.blurb: Convention exclusives, anniversary promos, McDonald's drops, etc.

buckets.label: Pikachu PSA 10
buckets.blurb: Graded gem-mint Pikachus. Holds value better than raw long-term.
